title.en: Ye Tian came to his neighborhood, but he didn't...

content.en:
Ye Tian found the Tumen Dao Ancestor, and the other party was silently analyzing in front of a large array, engrossed, and didn't even pay attention to the situation in the outside world.

This is the self-confidence of the Dao Ancestor incarnation, believing that no one dares to assassinate them, and even if they are assassinated, there is no way to kill them with one blow, so there is no need to observe the surrounding situation.

Ye Tian came to his neighborhood, but he didn't even notice it.

Ye Tian was not ready to assassinate and attack the Tumen Daozu incarnation, he was ready to fight with the Tumen Daozu incarnation in the bright light, assassination was not his style.

"Tumen Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian shouted loudly.

Hearing Ye Tian's voice, the Tumen Dao Ancestor's comprehension and analysis process was affected, and he immediately frowned, looked at Ye Tian, and immediately looked ecstatic, and said: "Ye Tian, you dare to appear in front of me, this time you are dead!"

Without saying a word, the Tumen Dao Ancestor immediately made a move, and as soon as he made a move, it was a brand new Dao weapon!

The reason why the True Monarch can't use the Dao weapon is because the True Monarch doesn't contain the power of the Dao, and the True Ancestor more or less contains the power of the True Ancestor, which can appropriately replace the Dao power, so the True Ancestor can use the Dao weapon, but the True Monarch cannot.

However, the Dao Ancestor incarnation uses Dao power, so the Dao Ancestor incarnation can also use Dao weapons.

Before, the incarnation of Tumen Dao Ancestor did not carry a Dao weapon to come, after all, the price paid for carrying a Dao weapon to come was very high, but now a Dao weapon appeared on Tumen Dao Ancestor's body.

Obviously, the Tumen Dao Ancestor has gained a lot in the past hundred years, and he must have obtained a lot of Dao weapons, so his strength is stronger than before.

It was precisely because of his stronger strength that Tumen Dao Ancestor had the confidence to suppress Ye Tian easily, and once Ye Tian was suppressed, he could obtain the opportunity treasure on Ye Tian's body, which was why he was so excited.

"Void Lock, Town!"

A strange ancient lock appeared in the void, blocking the void around Ye Tian.

This is a Dao weapon that specializes in sealing the void, even a half-step true ancestor with spatial origin divine powers, there is no way to break the blockade and leave here.

Tumen Dao Ancestor didn't want to repeat the mistakes of the past, and was worried that Ye Tian would leave silently through the space like last time, so as soon as he made a move, he used this harvested void lock to block the void.

After sealing the void, Tumen Daozu breathed a sigh of relief, as if he was no longer worried about the change.

"Ye Tian, hand over all the treasures, and then serve me, I can not kill you!"

Tumen Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Although he also wanted to kill Ye Tian, if Ye Tian was controlled by him, it would be equivalent to controlling a demonic genius, and he could even use Ye Tian to do something.

Of course, in the end, he still has to kill Ye Tian, after all, no matter how much he controls it, if it gets out of control one day, a genius like Ye Tian will be too terrifying, and he doesn't dare to keep Ye Tian.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian responded coldly.

In fact, Tumen Dao Ancestor's blockade of the Void was exactly what he wanted, so that no one would disturb the battle between them.

In an instant, the two fought together.

Rumble!!!

With a touch of a knife and a spear, the incarnation of Tumen Dao Ancestor was directly shocked and flew out, and even the body of the incarnation was faintly about to be shaken apart, if he hadn't refined a defensive Dao weapon, he would probably have been hit hard this time.

"How is it possible, how long has it been, how can your strength become so strong? You are still a true monarch, it stands to reason that you should have reached the ultimate of a true monarch a long time ago, and if you don't break through to the half-step true ancestor realm, your strength will not be able to improve in any way!"

Tumen Dao Ancestor was extremely puzzled, Ye Tian in front of him was simply powerful and abnormal!

Even if Ye Tian had a strange thing, it was impossible for him to be so demonic, it simply broke his cognition.

Ye Tian did not respond to the Tumen Dao Ancestor, but launched attacks again and again.

"Yin and Yang Pole Knife, Slash!"

The Yin Yang Dao and the Dao of the Sword fused into a wisp of gray sword, instantly tearing through the void and slashing towards the Dao Ancestor of the Tumen.

Tear and pull!

Tumen Dao Ancestor didn't have time to dodge, one arm was directly cut off, and it was not simply cut off one arm, the power of the Yin and Yang Pole Knife was still on Tumen Dao Ancestor's wound, preventing him from recovering.

In other words, in a short period of time, this arm of Tumen Dao Ancestor could not heal at all.

This knife hurt Tumen Dao Ancestor!

"Shake the sky!"

Ye Tian once again used an Origin Divine Power, and it was his strongest Origin Divine Power.

Rumble!!!!

The void shook, and even the void lock trembled, as if it couldn't suppress the void at all.

Tumen Daozu was injured again, and was directly injured by the earthquake in the air, and the whole person kept coughing up blood and retreated.

Although the Dao Ancestor incarnation is an incarnation, it is actually flesh and blood decomposed from the body, and it is a flesh and blood clone in the strict sense, otherwise there is no way to forcibly descend to the quasi-Dao realm.

Therefore, the Dao Ancestor incarnation looked no different from a normal being.

Being able to make Dao Ancestor incarnate cough up blood, this is already a not light injury.

"Death, even if you are desperately weak, I will kill you!"

Tumen Daozu was completely furious.

As the incarnation of Dao Ancestor, the soul power contained in his body is not very much, once he uses his soul consciousness to attack, the soul power cannot be replenished, and he will become weaker and weaker.

Therefore, the Dao Ancestor incarnation never used soul consciousness to attack.

But now, Tumen Dao Ancestor can't care about it, if he competes in strength, his incarnation is too much worse than Ye Tian, and even if his realm is much higher than Ye Tian, it will be useless.

"Spirit Extermination, Kill!"

Tumen Dao Ancestor's soul consciousness turned into a small soul spear, piercing towards Ye Tian's soul hole.

In the face of this attack by the Tumen Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian did not panic at all, and instantly cast the three-element integration, and the physical strength and divine power turned into the power of the divine soul, and then urged the soul defense half-way weapon, plus the soul defense supernatural power.

Rumble!!!!

The spear of the Spirit Extermination Technique bombarded Ye Tian's soul defense, as if a stainless steel spear was pierced on the stainless steel shield, although the stainless steel shield trembled, but it did not really break the stainless steel shield.

When Ye Tian's face was just pale and his soul was not annihilated, the Tumen Dao Ancestor completely changed color.

"Impossible, you are just a true monarch, and your soul has not completely transformed, how can you block my spirit annihilation technique?"

Tumen Daozu couldn't believe this scene.

Subsequently, he performed the Spirit Annihilation Technique again, but he still didn't help Ye Tian, but instead he performed the Spirit Annihilation Technique twice, and his soul consciousness was already very weak, and I am afraid that ten percent of the strength of the incarnation would not be able to exert fifty percent.

At this moment, Tumen Dao Ancestor panicked!

He didn't want to fall, once he fell, all the gains on his body would be gone, and the loss would be too great.
